leaderRationale: Parse failed after auto-fix attempt: ERROR: codex failed: spawn codex ENOENT
unresolved: Leader response parse failed — bug report written

conceptual_groups.summary: Parse failed: Unexpected token 'E', "ERROR: cod"... is not valid JSON
conceptual_groups.redesign_guidance: LLM response was not valid JSON. Bug report written.

conceptual_groups.summary: Output paths in <outputs> omit the canonical directory prefix, causing self-check MISSING_REQUIRED_OUTPUT failures

findings.description: Canonical artifacts in <outputs> use bare filenames (e.g. '<slug>-role.md') rather than full paths (e.g. 'tools/agent-role-builder/role/<slug>-role.md'). Self-check cannot reconcile these against the filesystem paths it expects.

conceptual_groups.redesign_guidance: Prefix each canonical artifact entry in <outputs> with the canonical directory path: tools/agent-role-builder/role/<slug>-role.md, tools/agent-role-builder/role/<slug>-role-contract.json, etc. Internal/evidence artifacts may remain relative to the run output directory.

conceptual_groups.summary: Duplicate 'Application workflow creation' entry in <scope> Not-in-scope list

findings.description: 'Application workflow creation' appears twice in the Not-in-scope list with slightly different parenthetical notes. This is redundant and may cause confusion about which exclusion applies.

conceptual_groups.redesign_guidance: Merge the two entries into one, preserving the parenthetical clarification: 'Application workflow creation (role definition markdown is a role specification, not a workflow)'.

conceptual_groups.summary: Contract intent field describes resume/finalize operation rather than the stable primary purpose of the role

findings.description: contract.intent reads 'Resume and finalize the agent-role-builder self-role using improved review process (structured feedback, split-verdict, arbitration).' This describes a one-time bootstrap operation, not the durable purpose of the role. The intent field will mislead future consumers of the contract.

conceptual_groups.redesign_guidance: Replace contract.intent with a stable statement of purpose, e.g. 'Create, update, and fix agent role packages through governed multi-LLM review, producing frozen packages only when no material pushback remains.'

residual_risks: Step 4 arbitration trigger ('after 2+ consecutive splits') is not defined in <guardrails> — if guardrails and steps diverge in a future update, arbitration may be silently dropped.

The completion condition does not specify a timeout or escalation path if a session stalls before reaching a terminal status — the watchdog_timeout in the contract covers runtime, but no role-level fallback is documented.
strengths: Governance rules are precise and internally consistent: freeze requires every reviewer to approve and the leader to report no unresolved material issues.
Artifact lifecycle is well-structured with clear always/conditional/internal distinctions.
Authority boundaries are tight and correctly exclude tool creation, code execution, and runtime orchestration.
Split-verdict handling with per-rejecting-reviewer iteration is a sound design that avoids full-board re-runs for single-reviewer disagreements.
Self-check step explicitly enumerates the required XML tag set, making structural validation unambiguous.
